rationale: The citing paper uses Sethuraman, Tellis, and Briesch (2011) only in a grouped comparison of elasticity magnitudes, noting its reported benchmark value alongside other meta-analyses. This functions as background calibration for interpreting effect size, not as a basis for the paper's hypotheses, identification strategy, or model construction. There is no distinct, paper-specific conceptual or methodological dependence on this citation in the main analysis.
